column5: Description

Achieve stackability.

Achieve® is versatile and perfect for numerous applications, including guest and lobby areas, meetings and conference rooms. Available in plastic back or upholstered back versions, the Achieve side chair can be specified with or without arms and with optional casters for convenient transport and storage.

Features

• Clean and contemporary
• Upholstered or plastic back
• Body hugging contoured design
• Stacks 4 on the floor or 5 on the optional cart (varies by model)
• Wall-saver frame design
• Additional seat foam option
• CAL 133 approved
• 250 lb weight capacity

Powerful design.

Sleek, aerodynamic lines give the Amplify™ collection power, with a look of modern design and sumptuous comfort. Midback and highback mesh chairs are available in multiple frame, arm and base colors. The mesh back features adjustable lumbar bands that provide optimum ergonomics. The comfortable mesh back model comes in 10 colors and the upholstered waterfall seat is available in 10 fabric or leather textile grades with optional contrast stitching. Amplify offers more built-in features than any other chair in its class, with enhanced synchro, height adjustable arms and adjustable lumbar support. The curvaceous profile and soft, textured arm pads make this a chair that delivers style as well as substance.

Features

• Midback and highback task chairs and task stools
• Aerodynamic design
• Multiple frame, back support and arm color choices
• Adjustable lumbar support
• 10 bleach-cleanable mesh back colors
• Contrast stitching in 10 thread colors (mesh model only)
• Enhanced synchro or swivel tilt
• Waterfall seat
• 3 arm styles with textured arm pads
• Black, fog, silver or polished aluminum base
• Optional seat depth adjustment
• Standard 300 lb weight capacity
• Super Duty Series – Large & Tall 400 lb weight capacity option
• Lifetime warranty for single shift use or 12 Years for 24/7
• All options and 1,000’s of fabrics ship in 5 to 10 days

Anywhere seating- anytime.

The economical Anytime™ collection was designed for corporate, government and educational settings where flexibility and style are key requirements. The perforated seat and back provide ample ventilation and upholstered pads can be added for increased comfort. Anytime can be specified with either a black or silver frame, upholstered or plastic in 3 designer colors. The pull handle ensures that the Anytime side chair is ready to go anytime and anywhere it is needed.

Features

• Fully upholstered, upholstered seat or plastic
• 1,000s of textiles or 3 plastic colors
• Perforated shell provides ventilation
• Built-in pull handle
• Black or silver tubular frame
• Stacks 6 on the floor, 8 on the optional cart
• 250 lb weight capacity warranty
• All options and 1,000’s of fabrics ship in 5 to 10 days

Get to work, anywhere, anytime

The Anytime™ task chair and stool pair perfectly with the Anytime side chair to make a complete set. Featuring the versatility that is the signature of the collection along with a perforated shell and a built-in pull handle, Anytime makes any office, meeting or training room a work space.

Features

• Task chair and task stool
• Fully upholstered, upholstered seat only or plastic
• 3 plastic colors
• Perforated shell provides ventilation
• Built-in pull handle
• Black tubular frame
• CAL 133 approved models
• 250 lb weight capacity warranty
• All options and 1,000’s of fabrics ship in 5 to 10 days

Take a seat (with confidence).

From lobbies to lounges, welcoming areas to waiting rooms, Aviera® delivers supremely comfortable, do-it-all seating for every space. With wood and metal models, effortless configuration, and lasting durability, this collection is designed for worry-free style that stands the test of time.

Features

• Available in both wood and metal models to fit any aesthetic
• Comprehensive multi-seating line with single-seat, center-arm, and non-intervening arm models
• Durable steel frame construction with metal-to-metal connections
• Maple and Beech wood options pair with four wood finishes
• Standard beveled, wall-saver frame design
• Field-replaceable parts for easy maintenance
• Convenient clean-out space for effortless upkeep
• Optional USB power for added convenience
• Super Duty Series options: 500 lb weight capacity warranty on guest models; 750 lb on bariatric models
• PatternMatch® technology, moisture barrier, and complete multi upholstery options available
• 12-year warranty for lasting peace of mind
• All options and 1,000’s of fabrics ship in 5 to 10 days

Unlimited Axys

Take your space anywhere with an expansive collection of sleek, go-everywhere style. From guest and lounge to task and stool, Axys delivers design versatility and commercial durability — all in a delightfully comfortable package.

Features

• Sculpted contouring paired with a perfectly padded seat for essential comfort
• Expertly crafted stitching, featuring double-needle and French seam border for added sophistication
• Expansive collection designed for versatile applications across any space
• Commercial-grade durability built to handle the demands of daily use
• Three distinctive shells available across five versatile models: guest, lounge, light task, bar stool, and counter stool
• Slim, modern low-back design elevates the style of bar and counter stools
• Steel wire rod frame with eye-catching X-pattern offered in charcoal and chrome finishes
• 5-star base available in polished aluminum, charcoal and white
• Lifetime warranty
• 350 lb weight capacity warranty

Let’s come together

When you want to feel the room and fill the room, there’s Baja™. Its comfort, customization, features and function will stand out – all while blending in – and echo the vibe of any space with subtle sophistication. Discover what’s possible when you’re surrounded by cohesive design.

Features

• Scale and sculpture offer a roomier, more comfortable sit
• Seamless design and broad collection create cohesion in any space
• Residential-inspired features and options, including standard and low-back stools
• Responsive, single-piece shell offers 18 degrees of backrest flex
• Bases include wire rod, wire rod stool and 4-leg with casters or glides
• Upholstery available in thousands of textiles, including bleach-cleanable options
• Choose from 14 shell colors, three arm pad colors, two wire rod and three 4-leg finishes
• Stackable on the floor or on a cart for quick clean-up and easy storage
• 300 lb weight capacity warranty
• All options and 1,000’s of fabrics ship in 5 to 10 days
• Lifetime warranty

Shaped for more

Meet the lounge chair that stays true to its name, overflowing with purposeful design. Billo is a sculptural standout that turns softness into an art form. And its pillowy contours plus refined stitching evoke a design that’s as inviting as it is elevated — giving every space a seat worth sinking into.

Features

• Designed by CLAUDIO BELLINI Studio
• Sculptural silhouette with pillowy contours and refined stitching
• Ultra-soft, bolstered seat for sink-in comfort and long-lasting support
• Contract-grade durability with residential-inspired warmth
• Two models: midback for openness or privacy back for a more secluded feel
• Multi-upholstery options for seat, back, and valance deliver design flexibility
• Two base options
• 350 lb weight capacity
• Backed by a 12-year warranty

Sleek, chic + unique.

Tap into timeless beauty with a new take on an old classic. Cameo™ dares to move past tufted, boxy and overly square designs – both in shape and attitude. This inspired collection from the world-renowned CLAUDIO BELLINI Studio balances perfect proportions of slenderness with just enough contouring so that it feels as good as it looks.

Features

• Add a lightweight, modern look with slim ribbon leg design
• Promote all-around comfort with contoured seat, back and arms
• Complement seating with freestanding and modular inline and corner tables
• Choose between single-, two-, and three-seater seats and benches
• Design for traditional and modular configurations
• Create single-arm, dual-arm and armless configurations
• Build tables using five laminate top options
• Choose between charcoal, bronze or chrome sled-leg bases
• Designed by CLAUDIO BELLINI Studio
• Weight capacity warranty: 400 lb for single-seater; 800 lb for two- and three-seater
• CAL 133 approved
• 12-year warranty
• All options and 1,000’s of fabrics ship in 5 to 10 days

Cozy up to collaboration

Surround yourself with style and the enveloping comfort of Clova. This award-winning collection brings residential-inspired charm to modern workspaces, so you’ll always feel right at home.

Features

• Best of NeoCon Gold award winner from CLAUDIO BELLINI Studio
• Residential-inspired collection with commercial durability
• Tailored stitching and a sculpted silhouette on a two-piece design
• Multi-upholstery options available from thousands of textiles
• 7 distinct finishes offer easy space coordination
• Choice of 4-leg wood, 4-star metal, or light task base
• Lifetime warranty
• Weight capacity warranty: 350 lb for 4-star metal and light task; 275 lb for 4-leg wood

Seating, Perfectly Composed

Discover the style and durability to elevate hospitality, higher education, corporate, and healthcare spaces. The Flair, Curve, and Sharp designs of Composium® pair perfectly with benches and ottomans to blend elegance and comfort — on top of robust steel construction. With customizable options and thoughtful details, it’s a collection that brings harmony to any environment.

Features

• Club, settee and sofa sizes
• 3 bench sizes: single, double and three seat
• Durable steel rail construction (except ottoman)
• 3 arm models — Sharp, Flair and Curve
• 3 back types — square, round and scalloped
• 4 valance styles — full, integrated, 3/4 and arched
• 11 foot styles including casters, metal pole and wood
• PatternMatch™ expertise and multiple upholstery options
• Optional wood arm cap, clean-out space and removable bench cushion
• Optional power module includes AC, USB-A and USB-C ports for versatile charging
• Sustainable manufacturing and Take Back Program
• 300 lb per seat weight capacity warranty
• Field-replaceable parts

Endearing design. Enduring support.

With expert insight from Certified Healthcare Interior Designers® (CHID), Cora TM is designed to withstand the high demands of our modern spaces. It’s a research-driven solution engineered for cleanability, reliability and durability – while ensuring central comfort and cohesion across every model.

Features

• Designed with expert insight from Certified Healthcare Interior Designers® (CHID)
• A high-performing solution for any industry, including corporate, healthcare, education and more
• Super Duty Series weight capacity warranties: guest (500 lb), midsize (600 lb), bariatric (750 lb), easy-access hip (500 lb), and stool (500 lb)
• Easy to maintain with clean-out space and field-replaceable components, including seat and back
• Wall-saver frame keeps everything fresh, preventing scuffs and marks
• Looped arms are streamlined yet separated wide enough to sit down and get up with ease
• 15,000+ textiles plus bleach-cleanable, ballistic-nylon, moisture-barrier, and multi-upholstery options
• Edge-to-edge underseat cover provides full coverage on the guest model for enhanced stacking (4 on floor; 6 on cart)
• Meets Healthier Hospitals Safer Chemicals Challenge 2.3, BIFMA LEVEL, GreenGuard Gold, and BIFMA x5.1 to x5.41
• Guest, stool, and easy-access hip models have a lifetime warranty for single-shift use, or a 12-year warranty for multi-shift (24/7) use
• Midsize and bariatric models have a 10-year warranty for single-shift or multi-shift (24/7) use
• All options and thousands of textiles ship in 2, 5, or 10 days

Take comfort under your wing

Float into something softer. Cotton wraps you in comfort with sculpted curves, cozy contours, and a signature wingback that’s part privacy, all style. It doesn’t just fill a space — its subtle but meticulous refinement uplifts it. Whether you’re tuning in or zoning out, this is where design and downtime find their sweet spot.

Features

• Soft, sculpted form with residential appeal and a touch of subtle refinement
• Available in low, mid and highback options, including two wingback styles and ottoman add-on
• Wingback design provides some acoustic and visual privacy
• 4-star base in wood or metal for style contrast
• Optional solid wood tablet arm for integrated functionality
• Designed by CLAUDIO BELLINI Studio
• 400 lb weight capacity warranty
• 12-year warranty

Keep it clean.

Secure your PC with ease. Our CPU holder is a seamless strap that attaches to your workstation for a cleaner look.

Features

Band

• Supports most PC sizes (up to 52 inches in perimeter)
• Retracts on a 17-inch track with 360-degree swivel
• Quick and easy adjustments with an Allen key
• Weight capacity warranty: Up to 75 lb

Under Desk

• Slide-and-swivel movement makes adjustment easy
• Height Range: 11.8 inches – 21 inches
• Depth Range: 3.5 inches – 8 inches
• Track Travel: 12.8 inches

Write away (right away).

From big idea-making to simple note-taking, stay on task with a tool that helps you work. Our Doodle™ markerboards provide essential privacy as a screen while promoting impactful productivity as a convenient place to write.

Features

• Non-ghosting, durable writing surface can withstand endless scribbles and wipes
• Compatible with dry erase and wet erase markers
• Slim, straightforward design mixes well with any workspace
• Height options: 12, 18 and 24 inches; 30 inches available for midway and height-adjustable mounts
• Width options: 17 to 72 inches (in six-inch increments)
• Compatible with most mounts, including edge, middle, top, midway, freestanding, panel and height-adjustable

Power innovation.

eBEAM™ is a straightforward, streamlined solution for adding power to your workstations. With adaptable legs, multiple beam lengths and cable management options that make it practically mess-free, eBEAM is simply powerful (and powerfully simple).

Features

• Quick and easy installation in less than 10 minutes
• Cable management accessories ensure an uncluttered look
• Responsive, adaptable design includes movable leg positions
• Fits perfectly with any static or height-adjustable tabletop
• Seamless screen integration for providing privacy
• Beam sizes: 48, 60 and 72 inches (W) x 24 inches (H)
• Screen height options: 12, 18, 24 and 30 inches
• Screen material options: Clear acrylic, frosted acrylic, markerboard and fabric
• Standard configurations: 2-seat, 4-seat, 6-seat, 8-seat and 10-seat with adjustable leg positions
• 4-circuit, 8-wire power system included with standard or optional controlled duplex receptacles
• Power system is UL183 Listed
• Toolless power installation
• Optional horizontal, vertical and infeed wire management
• Data adapter kit included

First to flex.

To reach the height of comfort, you should start at its roots. A place where everything feels natural and effortless. Get ready to discover what’s possible when innovation comes to life because this is the first-ever flexing solution for lounge. It moves you. It moves with you. Envoi® is a pure exposition of comfort-meets-motion with unmatched, unencumbered design.

Features

• Designed by CLAUDIO BELLINI Studio
• Back rest flexes and moves when you recline
• Petal-like pieces surround with comfort
• Available in midback or highback
• 4-star base available in three wood or metal finishes
• Auto-return cylinder available on metal base only
• Dual-fabric available with seat cushion
• 300 lb weight capacity warranty
• 12-year warranty
• All options and thousands of textiles ship in 10 days

Making power simple.

Charge up (to keep up) with your day ahead. EON™ eliminates the struggle of finding an outlet with an easily accessible power source right at your fingertips. Keep your devices ready for any task with this line of convenient power modules.

Features

• Choose from dual-outlet or single-outlet / USB-C / USB-A
• AC outlet: 15A, 125V, 60Hz (NEMA5-15R)
• USB-C outlet when using USB-C only

• 30W: 5V/3A, 9V/3A, 12V/2.5A, 15V/2A, 20V/1.5

• USB-C outlet when using USB-C + USB-A

• 30W: 5V/3A, 9V/2A, 12V1.5A

• Add an easy-to-access power source at worksurface level
• Installs with surface mount clamp
• Cord: 8’ power cord
• UL Listing: UL/cUL Listed (UL962A)

Destination: Versatility

Discover how a truly flexible space takes Flyte. Stowable, stackable, customizable and comfortable, this innovative stacker-nester collection reaches new heights of what a multipurpose chair can do on the fly — in a mighty and mobile design.

Features

• Slim modern design fits any space — education, training, multipurpose and more
• Contoured seat and flexing back provide essential comfort
• Stacks up to 4 chairs and nests endlessly
• Handy latch securely locks the seat with a satisfying click
• Clean-out space and steel frame plus plastic shell and vinyl options make it ultra cleanable
• 12 breathable mesh colors; 3 plastic shell colors; 2 leg and arm colors
• 15,000+ textile options let you customize and coordinate easily
• 350 lb weight capacity warranty
• Lifetime warranty

column5:
Where comfort and style converge.

Invigorated with sporty back, arm and mesh options, the best-selling Focus™ still offers superior long-term comfort for a task environment. There are just so many customization choices for this top-selling task chair. Both midback and highback models offer optional adjustable lumbar support. Multiple back styles include relaxed-fit upholstered, mesh and an exceedingly ergonomic, flexible plastic to dress the familiar Y-shaped frame. Nine arm styles range from fixed to fully multi-adjustable and include a larger, more ergonomic arm pad. Focus is part of a broad and versatile collection that includes executive, side and stool models.

Features

• Ergonomic back support and comfort
• Midback and highback
• Relaxed-fit upholstered pad, mesh or plastic back
• 5 bleach-cleanable mesh colors
• Adjustable lumbar option
• 9 ergonomic arm styles with standard or Sport arm pads
• Black or silver accents
• Waterfall seat
• Lifetime warranty
• Optional Sport casters
• Standard 300 lb weight capacity warranty
• Super Duty Series - 350 lb (Heavy Duty) and 400 lb (Large & Tall) weight capacity option

Where comfort and style converge.

What goes into the award-winning line of Rio® stackable plastic chairs? Patented flexing technology, for one. Add a fresh, modern color palette and an extra-slim, stackable frame and you’ve got a multipurpose seating solution that allows for more movement, day-long comfort and flexibility than any other chair in its class. Our complete family of Rio® models feature our patented Active Rebound Control (ARC) Technology® - a performance-minded flexor insert that supports a wide range of motion (20 full degrees to be exact) and responds precisely to the amount of weight pressed against it. The Rio is an easy choice for multi-use spaces that require quick set-ups and breakdowns. Discover a collection of stackable chairs engineered to allow for better movement, applications across more environments and a longer product life.

Sit. Stay awhile.

With contemporary aesthetics, the Visit Modular® collection features flexible modularity and arm options for inventive space planning. Link arm and armless models with ganging brackets and an ottoman for common areas and waiting rooms. Handy seat-back handles and functional tablet arms make Visit Modular perfect for collaborative spaces and pull-up meetings.
Our customizable lounge line is now even more convenient thanks to our new power modules. Crafted with minimal seams for smoother integration and a cleaner look, they can be installed on either the fronts or sides of our models.

Features

• Armless chair and ottoman for modular seating
• Ganging brackets
• 2 arm styles: armless or upholstered
• Optional Tablet arm
• Back hook or handle
• Optional power module available

Mobile, adaptable and comfortable.

Gone are the days where you clock in, stay in your cubicle and clock out. Dynamic environments call for adaptable seating that rolls with the punches. Our Wit™ family does exactly that. Because this is a design inspired by truths about how people work.

Features

• Midback and highback task chairs; midback stool in two heights
• Standard adjustable lumbar support
• Built-in pull handle
• 12 solid mesh back colors
• Four woven striped mesh options
• 12 Thintex back colors in fabric or vinyl
• Three frame colors
• Basic, standard synchro and swivel tilt mechanisms
• Multi-adjustable (height/width), height-adjustable, armless and fixed arms
• Textured designer arms
• Optional seat depth adjustment
• Optional brushed aluminum base
• Waterfall seat
• Standard 300 lb weight capacity

Meet our sidekick.

A slimmer, stationary version of the task, our Wit™ Side is ideal for high-traffic settings like breakrooms and cafeterias. Thanks to its ultra-lightweight frame and identical built-in pull handle, you can swing it around and rearrange spaces easily to accommodate the constant flow of crowded areas.

Features

• Complements Wit Task and Wit Task stool
• Upholstered seat or plastic seat in three colors
• 12 Thintex and mesh back colors
• Built-in pull handle
• Black or silver frame
• Wall-saver frame design
• Textured arm pads
• Stacks four on the floor, four on the optional cart
• Choose from two caster types and four glide options
• 300 lb weight capacity
